ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-12-2011 IN DEPT. 220, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A) & (D). THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR FEBRUARY 28, 2011 AT 11:15AM IN DEPT. 220. MSC WILL BE HELD ON 2/22/11 AT 9:00AM IN DEPT. 603. DISCOVERY REMAINS OPEN UNTIL CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL JUDGE. SUMMARY JUDGMENT MOTIONS MAY BE FILED ON 10 DAYS NOTICE, WITH NO ADDITIONAL DAYS FOR E-SERVICE. THE HEARING ON THE SUMMARY JUDGMENT MOTIONS WILL TAKE PLACE ON THE DAY OF TRIAL. MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT TO BE FILED BY 2/18/11; OPPOSITION FILED BY 2/24/11 AND REPLY WILL BE BROUGHT BY HAND ON THE HEARING OF 2/28/11 AT 9:30AM. PLAINTIFF WILL MAKE A DEMAND ON ALL DEFENDANTS BY 2/15/11. PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS BY 2/4/11. IF PARTIES ARE TO ENGAGE IN WRITTEN DISCOVERY, RESPONSE TIME WILL BE 15 DAYS AND THIS APPLIES BOTH WAYS AND MAY BE SERVED BY FAX OR LEXIS NEXIS. A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET FOR 2/4/11 AT 1:30PM IN DEPT. 220. BY THE END OF THE DAY TOMORROW, PLAINTIFF MUST PROVIDE ANSWERS TO WHETHER MR. BODDEN CAN BE DEPOSED AND IF SO, WHAT ARE THE RESTRICTIONS NECESSARY FOR HIS HEALTH AND ALL HIS MEDICAL SUPPORT; WHERE HE CAN BE DEPOSED AND WHAT CURRENT MEDICATIONS IS HE TAKING. DEPOSTIONS WILL TAKE PLACE IN HONDURAS BEGINNING ON 2/1/11. PLAINTIFF IS TO MAKE ARRANGEMENTS WITH VIDEO CONFERENCING. FURTHER HEARING REGARDING DEPOSITIONS WILL BE ON 1/14/11 AT 1:30PM IN DEPT.220. A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET FOR 2/4/11 AT 1:30PM IN DEPT. 220. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER AND APPROVED AS TO FORM TO BE PRESENTED TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE ON 1/14/11. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (220)
